nodes.name: Black-bodied woodpecker
nodes.summary: Black-bodied woodpecker（Black-bodied woodpecker，学名 Dryocopus schulzii），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于大查科，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 大查科
nodes.summary: 大查科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括Chaco chachalaca、查科林鴞、Black-bodied woodpecker等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the woodland and savanna of the dry Gran Chaco and the transition zones between them and moister montane forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the woodland and savanna of the dry Gran Chaco and the transition zones between them and moister montane forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the woodland and savanna of the dry Gran Chaco and the transition zones between them and moister montane forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The species is threatened by habitat loss through clearance of woodland for the expansion of agriculture and cattle-ranching, plantations of non-native trees, as well as selective logging of quebracho and algarrobo trees for charcoal." It apparently has two population centers, in Argentina's Córdoba and San Luis provinces and in central Paraguay, and is very scarce elsewhere
